rulings.Case Title: BRANDY A. TRUEMAN VS. CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS/PENDENCY OF ACTION
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS/PENDENCY OF ACTION. Grant, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIREYA THUMAS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Off Calendar, parties failed to comply with order of Aug. 2, 2012 by Aug. 9, 2012 by 4PM. In the future counsel should cite valid not reversed case law, i.e., Citizens of Humanity 170 CA 4 1,22. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIREYA THUMAS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Joinder To Demurrer Of Deft To Pltd'S Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT REGIONAL SERVICE CORPORATION's Joinder To Demurrer Of Defendant To Plaintiff'S Amended Complaint. Off Calendar, parties failed to comply with order of Aug. 2, 2012 by Aug. 9, 2012 by 4PM. In the future counsel should cite valid not reversed case law, i.e., Citizens of Humanity 170 CA 4 1,22. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIMON CHANG VS. HENRY HALL DESIGNS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT HENRY HALL DESIGNS' DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sutain with leave to amend to properly allege correct CCP 1162 sub section. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AURORA BANK, FSB VS. CARLOS DOMINGUEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs MARVIN AGUILERA, SANDRA AMAYA, OSCAR AMAYA, JUDHID TALAVERA, HUGO MENJIVAR's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege in good faith landlord tenant relationship. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC VS. KIMBERLY SWAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery; To Continue Settlement Conference And Trial; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf Mcormack Baron Ragan Management Services And Its Attorneys Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY SWAN's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery; To Continue Settlement Conference And Trial; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Mcormack Baron Ragan Management Services And Its Attorneys Of Record. Hearing required to address when responses due and if objections timely. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NAY PATEL VS. DARLENE VALDZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT DARLENE VALDE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Deny per CCP 1005, insufficient notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. DINA ALAC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 7. PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant Motion for Summary Judgment as to Defendant Alac, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. JAY ROSENKRANTZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 8. PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, moving party failed to shift burden. Fails to establish landlord tenant relationship re unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. DON L LINDNER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, moving party failed to shift burden. Fails to establish landlord tenant relationship re unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVELYN A BOWENS VS. DANIEL CHYTROWSKI et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 10. DEFENDANT DANIEL CHYTROWSKI's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Grant with leave to amend to allege proper date damages to run from. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMORE REAL ESTATE, INC. et al VS. EMMALYN MUNJAR, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA EMMALYN'S et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 17, 2012, line 11. DEFENDANT EMMALYN MUNJAR's Motion To Quash. Deny untimely per CCP 1167.4(a). = (501/REQ)
